commit.message:
🚀 Release v2.0.0-alpha.128 - Build Optimization & Memory Coordination

- Fixed build issues by removing 32 UI files
- Validated MCP memory coordination features
- Updated all core agents with MCP tools
- Created 5 new hive-mind agents
- Tested and verified all CLI commands
- Published to npm as claude-flow@alpha

🐝 Add hive-mind agents with mandatory memory coordination

- Create collective-intelligence-coordinator for distributed cognition
- Add swarm-memory-manager for distributed memory operations
- Create queen-coordinator for hierarchical control
- Add worker-specialist for task execution with progress reporting
- Create scout-explorer for reconnaissance and discovery
- Update hierarchical-coordinator with memory protocol
- Inject memory coordination into swarm and hive-mind commands
- All agents now enforce memory writes to coordination namespace
- Implement 5-step mandatory coordination pattern
- Enable automatic CLAUDE.md injection with --claude flag

📝 Update swarm coordination with mandatory memory write protocol

- Add comprehensive memory coordination section to CLAUDE.md
- Enforce WRITE-first pattern for all agents
- Specify 'coordination' namespace for all operations
- Add 5-step mandatory memory protocol
- Update swarm-init.md with memory requirements
- Create detailed example showing proper memory usage
- Fix agent coordination by requiring status writes
- Add structured key patterns for swarm data
- Include monitoring commands for visibility

commit.message:
✨ feat: Add agentic-payments MCP integration to init process

Integrated agentic-payments MCP server into claude-flow init command for
autonomous agent payment authorization capabilities.

Changes:
- Added agentic-payments to MCP server registry in setupMcpServers()
- Registered 7 payment authorization functions in MCPIntegrator
- Updated .mcp.json configuration template
- Added manual setup instructions across 3 locations
- Verified build compilation with 569 files

Features enabled:
- Active Mandate creation with spend caps and time windows
- Ed25519 cryptographic signing and verification
- Intent-based and cart-based payment mandates
- Agent identity generation with keypairs
- Mandate revocation with audit trails
- Byzantine fault-tolerant consensus verification
